name: uplift-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins by Uplift Tech

plugins.name: vercel-gha-deploy
plugins.description: Set up Vercel deploys via GitHub Actions with a main-only branch gate and auto-bumped vX.Y.Z version tags. Bootstraps a fresh repo if it isn't linked yet.

plugins.name: upliftcontrolversion
plugins.description: Wire a repo so every deploy auto-bumps a git tag (vX.Y.Z), bakes it into the artifact, shows it to humans, and stops OTEL_SERVICE_VERSION from drifting off a hardcoded value. Uplift's own versioning playbook.

plugins.name: upliftgha
plugins.description: Set up, migrate, or audit GitHub Actions CI/CD for a repo — including converting a Jenkins pipeline to GHA. Routes to vercel-gha-deploy for Vercel frontends and always wires in upliftcontrolversion; owns the AWS EC2 and ECS deploy shapes directly.

plugins.name: uplift-repo-polish
plugins.description: Polish a GitHub repo's public presentation — README badges + scannable structure, the About sidebar (description, topics, homepage), a detected LICENSE, and a GitHub Release cut from an existing tag. Detects current state and only fills gaps; confirms before any public publish.
